Motion To Consolidate Actions Of Cases Cpf-07-507635 With Case Cgc-07-466182
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Joseph Kenney of Severson & Werson, 677.5505, appearing for plaintiff and responding party
Iain A. MacDonald of MacDonald and Associates, 362.0449, appearing for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Bank of America's Motion to consolidate actions of cases CPF-07-507635 with case CGC-07-466182, is granted for all purposes. Case CGC-07-466182 is designated the lead case. Order signed in open Court. (302/DEW/AY) Judge Diane E. Wick, Reporter Maria Torreano, CSR #8600
